subject: [AAI] Use a recent HAProxy
commit_message:
[AAI] Use a recent HAProxy

AAI uses an old HAProxy version (1.4.2). This patch allow to use the
latest one and to log on STDOUT.

Issue-ID: OOM-2830
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: If21282efaf1cfc5fc02eae90e77cac0ddbf0e82c
